title: Q13 Reaches Step 4 — Adopted by ICH Assembly
description: The ICH Assembly has adopted Q13 Continuous Manufacturing of Drug Substances and Drug Products, advancing it from Step 3 to Step 4.

title: M10 Advances to Step 3 — Regulatory Review
description: M10 Bioanalytical Method Validation and Study Sample Analysis has advanced to Step 3 following the close of public consultation.

title: Public Consultation Opens for E20 Adaptive Clinical Trials
description: ICH has opened a 90-day public consultation period for the draft E20 guideline on adaptive clinical trial design.

title: S12 Gene Therapy Biodistribution — Consultation Extended
description: The public consultation for S12 has been extended by 30 days to allow additional stakeholder feedback on biodistribution study requirements.

title: S11 Paediatric Safety Guideline Reaches Step 2b
description: S11 Nonclinical Safety Testing in Support of Development of Paediatric Medicines has reached Step 2b, with the draft released to regulatory members.

title: New Training Module: Q8(R2) Pharmaceutical Development
description: A comprehensive training video on implementing Q8(R2) quality by design principles is now available in the training library.

title: E6(R2) GCP Training Webinar Recording Available
description: The recorded webinar on E6(R2) Good Clinical Practice implementation is now available for on-demand viewing.

title: Q3C(R8) Revision Published — Updated Residual Solvents Limits
description: The latest revision of Q3C on impurities in residual solvents has been published with updated permitted daily exposure limits for select solvents.

title: M4(R4) Common Technical Document — Format Update
description: M4(R4) has been updated with revised formatting guidance for the Common Technical Document to improve electronic submission compatibility.

title: E19 Reaches Step 5 — Implementation Phase Begins
description: E19 Optimisation of Safety Data Collection has reached Step 5 and is now being implemented by regulatory authorities in member regions.

title: Q14 Analytical Procedure Development Reaches Step 2a
description: Q14 has reached Step 2a with the draft guideline released for public consultation across all ICH regions.

title: ICH Welcomes SAHPRA as New Regulatory Member
description: The South African Health Products Regulatory Authority (SAHPRA) has been admitted as a regulatory member of ICH, expanding the global harmonisation network.

title: ICH Strategic Plan 2026–2030 Published
description: The ICH Assembly has endorsed the new five-year strategic plan outlining priorities for guideline development, digital transformation, and stakeholder engagement.

title: ICH Public Meeting — Brussels, June 2026
description: ICH will host a public meeting in Brussels on June 15–16, 2026, providing updates on guideline development and implementation progress.

title: ICH Assembly Meeting — Fukuoka, November 2026
description: The ICH Assembly will convene in Fukuoka, Japan in November 2026 for its biannual meeting to review guideline progress and strategic initiatives.
